name: symantec_endpoint_protection
explanation: Symantec Endpoint Protection is a vendor-tile logs-only integration. The spec contains only a `template: logs` block configuring a UDP syslog listener (`type: udp`, `port: <PORT>`) and there is no Agent metric check — the `datadog_checks/symantec_endpoint_protection/` package ships only `__init__.py` and `__about__.py`. Setup requires the user to (1) configure the SEP Manager to forward syslog to the Agent and (2) pick a UDP port, neither of which is discoverable on the wire. Auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply.
notes: Logs-only vendor security tile (UDP syslog ingestion). No probe surface; the user-supplied UDP port is intent, not a discoverable property.
